verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g
Each required evidence_feature must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.
Adjacent interfaces must have reciprocal definitions in neighboring subsystems.
Critical joints must show visible locking or preload evidence.
Motor power lines and sensor/encoder signal lines must be separated.

risk.desc: Potential interference between the cable exit port and the wrist band snap receiver.
risk.mit: Ensure sufficient clearance between the cable exit port and the wrist band snap receiver.

risk.desc: Risk of over-tightening during assembly which could damage the controller board.
risk.mit: Specify torque limits and provide clear assembly instructions.

risk.mit: Evaluate the effectiveness of the tool-less lid design and consider additional sealing measures if necessary.

verify.value: Flexion-resistance actuator modules plug in and remain visible near knuckle row.

verify.value: Rigid mock assembly preserves soft-contact cues, wrist quick release, and ergonomic clearance.

verify.value: Finger and wrist wiring uses service loops, strain relief at every flex boundary, and a stated bend radius sized for repeated flexion cycles.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment of hinge pin due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Implement tighter manufacturing tolerances and conduct post-manufacture alignment checks.

risk.desc: Risk of actuator module dislodgement during high-force interactions.
risk.mit: Increase the number of mounting points and apply appropriate preload to ensure secure attachment.

risk.desc: Thermal expansion may affect the fit between finger cartridge and thimble socket over time.
risk.mit: Use materials with similar thermal expansion coefficients for better long-term compatibility.

risk.desc: Wiring may become damaged if not properly routed and secured.
risk.mit: Ensure proper routing and securing of wires with strain relief at each flex boundary.

risk.desc: Service holes may not provide sufficient access for maintenance tasks.
risk.mit: Review and adjust the size and placement of service holes to ensure adequate access.
